narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 1-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 558 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points.
